mapper.select: SELECT checklist_id AS checklistId, trip_id AS tripId, item_name AS itemName, category, is_checked AS isChecked, check_manager AS checkManager FROM trip_checklist WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY category, checklist_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO trip_checklist (trip_id, item_name, category, is_checked, check_manager) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{itemName}, #{category}, 0, #{checkManager})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM trip_checklist WHERE checklist_id = #{checklistId} AND trip_id = #{tripId}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT category FROM trip_checklist WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND category IS NOT NULL ORDER BY category
